chapters.title: Ambulance Corps Days in Milan
chapters.teaser: A young Ernest Hemingway chafes at a support role and hungers for the front, where romance and bravado quickly give way to the realities of war.

chapters.title: The Ritz Circle in Prewar Paris
chapters.teaser: In the gilded calm of the Ritz, Hemingway spars with friends, rivals, and his own restlessness as Europe darkens and old habits resurface.

chapters.title: Landing and the First Push Inland
chapters.teaser: On the eve of invasion and the day it arrives, Hemingway plunges into the chaos of the front, courting danger and influence among soldiers and commanders.

chapters.title: An Irregulars Network Toward Paris
chapters.teaser: As the lines advance, Hemingway gathers a small band and a growing web of intelligence, pushing boundaries while pressure from official channels tightens.

chapters.title: Paris Run and the Ritz Objective
chapters.teaser: With the city near, a risky race through uncertain streets culminates in a charged arrival at a beloved destination—past and present echoing in the same rooms.

chapters.title: The First Loss
chapters.teaser: A timed run for an exit ends in sudden violence, setting an ominous tone for a game where time and rules matter.

chapters.title: The Floor and the Invitation
chapters.teaser: In the rush of the Stock Exchange and the quiet of an empty mansion, a confident trader carries private worries toward a familiar, secret appointment.

chapters.title: Rules of the Room
chapters.teaser: A guarded estate reveals a wood-paneled game room where players, doors, and a strict host frame a high-risk contest with shifting stakes.

chapters.title: Through Door Twelve
chapters.teaser: A harsh landscape tests endurance and instincts, and a fragmented map leads from open desert into a stranger, more populated wilderness.

chapters.title: Village Paths and Prison Stones
chapters.teaser: A clash with local hunters pulls the traveler toward a village, a wary guide, and a covert rescue that changes what the mission means.

chapters.title: What the Maps Don’t Say
chapters.teaser: Safe by firelight, truths about time, love, and hidden systems surface as a new threat races toward the same prize.

chapters.title: Two Routes to the Mountain
chapters.teaser: One group takes a direct, dangerous passage while another climbs above; both push toward a marked mountain as hazards multiply.

chapters.title: Cannibal Skies, Forest Traps
chapters.teaser: An open crossing triggers airborne hunters and a deadly botanical maze, forcing hard choices as pursuers close in.

chapters.title: Inside the Gargoyle Mountain
chapters.teaser: Steam, stone, and fire lead to a final ascent where improvised tactics, rival players, and a guarded door converge under shrinking time.

chapters.title: The Run Back
chapters.teaser: With the mountain collapsing behind them, survivors race through familiar hazards and chase a fleeing opponent toward the only way out.

chapters.title: Aftermath in the Game Room
chapters.teaser: The return ignites a confrontation that spills beyond the contest itself, leaving the remaining players to face unsettling answers and a new direction.

chapters.title: The Yacht Heist
chapters.teaser: A luxury cruise in the Keys is interrupted by a sleek black vessel and a crew that moves with practiced precision.

chapters.title: Investors and Legends
chapters.teaser: A small dive shop pins its hopes on a long-obsessed wreck, courting money and equipment to chase a story buried offshore.

chapters.title: The Madrid Expedition
chapters.teaser: With a bigger boat and new tech, the team returns to the water—finding signs that their target may be closer than ever.

chapters.title: Shadow Crew
chapters.teaser: As the salvage crew celebrates progress, unseen players converge—some close, some watching from the dark water.

chapters.title: Night Raid at Sea
chapters.teaser: A sudden, coordinated strike turns a routine night aboard into a fight for survival in cramped corridors and black water.

chapters.title: Loggerhead Gambit and Aftermath
chapters.teaser: Stranded and hunted, the survivors attempt a desperate counterplay as larger forces collide around the stolen haul.

chapters.title: Catastrophe in the Tube
chapters.teaser: A high-tech test run reaches critical speed inside a massive spinning apparatus. As the energy builds, the control room watches events veer out of control.

chapters.title: A Thesis Under Pressure
chapters.teaser: On a college campus, an ambitious student tries to hold his life together while chasing a breakthrough. A late-night lab setup turns desperation into risky experimentation.

chapters.title: Demonstration Day Fallout
chapters.teaser: With everything prepared for a formal presentation, tensions run high as outsiders close in. The consequences of cutting corners collide with the need to be believed.

chapters.title: The Billionaire’s Invitation
chapters.teaser: A surprise interview leads to an exclusive world of artifacts, power, and hidden agendas. Over dinner, an irresistible proposal takes shape behind closed doors.

chapters.title: Pennsylvania Site Visit
chapters.teaser: A remote facility reveals the scale of an operation built in secrecy. Amid repairs and towering machinery, a bold question hangs in the air.

chapters.title: The Microsync Run
chapters.teaser: A tightly timed infiltration inside a high-security tech facility puts a small team’s tools and teamwork to the test.

chapters.title: An Offer and an Ominous Signal
chapters.teaser: Back at their loft, the crew’s everyday hustle is interrupted by federal attention and unsettling signs of something larger.

chapters.title: Leads, Allies, and a Trip to Berlin
chapters.teaser: As clues point overseas, the team leans on old friends and cutting-edge gadgets to chase the trail in unfamiliar territory.

chapters.title: The Evidence Heist
chapters.teaser: A coordinated operation unfolds around a police station, where timing, disguises, and surveillance tech must all align.

chapters.title: A Cargo Deadline
chapters.teaser: With new information in hand, the team races home to intercept a high-stakes shipment before events outrun their control.

chapters.title: Blackout at the Port
chapters.teaser: At the Oakland docks, a sudden disruption turns a watchful stakeout into a fast-moving confrontation with no margin for error.

chapters.title: A Murder on the Grid
chapters.teaser: A routine pursuit in the Dream World turns uncanny when an unseen force bends the rules and leaves the Dream Police scrambling for answers across both realities.

chapters.title: Off the Grid
chapters.teaser: As grief and pressure mount, a new agent steps in and the investigation exposes disturbing gaps in what the Dream Police thought they understood about Dreamers and Crossovers.

chapters.title: Loose Ends in Waking Life
chapters.teaser: A widening pattern of deaths and strange research pulls the case into the Real World, forcing uneasy alliances and a race to identify a culprit who won’t stay trackable.

chapters.title: The Net Tightens
chapters.teaser: With the threat escalating, leads converge through criminals, academia, and coercive tactics—until a name finally surfaces and a trap is set on both sides of sleep.

chapters.title: Quadrant Seven
chapters.teaser: A high-stakes operation at a volatile Dream World site tests every rule and every relationship, with consequences that echo back into the Real World.

chapters.title: The Commuter Line
chapters.teaser: A routine morning train ride in Washington, DC turns ominous as strange presences converge in a crowded car.

chapters.title: After the Blast
chapters.teaser: In the wake of catastrophe, Vincent scrambles through a locked-down city and confronts an impossible new reality closing in around him.

chapters.title: Hunted and Redirected
chapters.teaser: Pursuers reveal themselves as Vincent flees and returns to the one guide who can explain the dangers and the path to safety.

chapters.title: City of the Souls
chapters.teaser: Vincent arrives in Colma’s vast necropolis and is drawn into a hidden network of allies, tests, and unsettling truths.

chapters.title: Keys, Training, and Signals
chapters.teaser: As Vincent begins to master new abilities, threads of the larger conflict tighten—on both sides—toward an impending search.

chapters.title: Night Drop on a Ruined Coast
chapters.teaser: An unmarked team makes a covert insertion from high altitude and threads through a devastated coastal village toward a faint signal in the dark.

chapters.title: The Wounded in the Safe Room
chapters.teaser: Inside a shattered house, urgent triage and improvised care turn a fragile shelter into a tense holding point as outside threats draw closer.

chapters.title: A Funeral and Four Directions Home
chapters.teaser: Grief and duty collide at a military farewell, and the remaining team members scatter across the country into personal lives that don’t pause for war.

chapters.title: Leave Interrupted
chapters.teaser: Across separate hometowns, old conflicts and new pressures surface—until a sudden call pulls everyone back toward a mission with no bullets, only weather.

chapters.title: Flood Zone Triage
chapters.teaser: A rooftop insertion drops the team into a submerged school turned evacuation hub, where medical priorities, dwindling time, and uneasy strangers tighten the air.

chapters.title: The Second Storm Closing In
chapters.teaser: As conditions worsen, a desperate report draws part of the team into the floodwaters while trouble inside the shelter accelerates toward a breaking point.

chapters.title: The Unmarked Flight
chapters.teaser: A remote waste run turns into a desperate scramble when something far more human than cargo becomes trapped in the system. Back at the station, an exhausted crew gets pulled into one last unsettling assignment.

chapters.title: Dumped Alive
chapters.teaser: Questions lead to silence, then force. A terrifying descent delivers Emmit and his team into a landscape that looks like the end of the world—and people who have learned to survive it.

chapters.title: Leo’s Fortress and the Market of Lines
chapters.teaser: Dragged into a fortified settlement built from refuse, Emmit is judged by a leader who knows this desert’s rules. In a rough open-air exchange, power, barter, and threat collide as alliances strain.

chapters.title: Work, Truths, and a Dangerous Road
chapters.teaser: Under brutal routines and harsher lessons, Emmit learns what this wasteland really is and why it exists. A risky plan forms around scarce technology, but the cost of pursuing it keeps rising.
